text: 1 was with Allsh's Apastie in one of the Markets of Medina. He left (the markef) and so did 1. Then he asked thrios, "Where is the small (chi)?* Then he said, “Call ALHaS8R bin A" So ALHESER) bin ‘Al got up and started walking with a necklace (of beads) around his neck. The Prophet siretohed his hand out like this, and AH8s8N| cid the same. The Prophet ‘embraced him and said, 0 Allh! | love im, so please love him and love thase who love him Since Alld's Apostie said that. nofhing has been dearer to me than AHHasaR. Pra— ; Sahih al-Bukhari 5884
